title: Snow Peas and Water Chestnuts
instructions:
Trim the ends and the stings off of the snow pea pods.
Rinse and drain the water chestnuts. Dry on a paper towel.
In a large skillet, heat the oil and add the pea pods. Stir fry for about 2 minutes. Add the water chestnuts and stir fry for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with the salt and pepper and serve.
